raw_8_compliance: PASS — witness-only emission cycle. No new .py/.sh/.rs/.toml. No SSOT edits. Single JSON write under design/kick/.

intake.topic_summary: Fresh fire-and-validate test of the kick(ω-cycle) protocol on the LLM-side path. Goal: prove that the protocol envelope (alpha/beta/gamma intake → N>=5 falsifiers → K>=3 axes → schema-validate gate → sentinel emit) is self-consistent on a synthetic-but-real topic; the witness IS the deliverable. β qrng_byte=112 (mod 3 = 1) → axis_b emphasis; mod 9 = 4 → ordering bias toward F4 schema-self-host probe; mod 4 = 0 → severity defaulted to PASS-on-deterministic. Honesty: no substantive design output produced this cycle — only protocol-fidelity verification; this is recorded under write_barrier.

alpha_absorbed.applied_to_design: absorbed primitive T1.D = 'no-tier3-false-positive-on-contract-raws — field-presence gating verified empirically'. Reframe for this fresh-test cycle: the kick witness ITSELF must self-pass field-presence gating — every required schema field (7 total per witness_emit.hexa lines 195-202) must be non-empty. Adopting absorbed motif: avoid 'fabrication via empty placeholder' — populate alpha/beta/gamma intake with the actual envelope objects from the prompt header (not the literal string 'selftest'), so witness_emit.hexa --validate passes against real content.

beta_qrng.payload_summary: qrng_byte=112 source=urandom (obs_2 reframe — T1 length=1024 queue active)
beta_qrng.applied_to_design: byte 112 (0x70) → mod 3 = 1 → axis_b (falsifier-deterministic-verifiability) bias-prioritized. mod 9 = 4 → emphasis on F4 (schema-validate self-host) for tie-breaking falsifier ordering. mod 4 = 0 → severity defaulted to PASS-on-deterministic-verifier (raw 53). KICK_BETA_REAL_ANU unset → urandom-fallback honesty label retained.

gamma_bridge.payload_summary: bridge_pick=bridge_arxiv invocation=tool/arxiv_realtime_bridge.hexa (real fetch deferred to sub-agent or OFFLINE-FALLBACK)
gamma_bridge.applied_to_design: arxiv bridge motif: pre-registration discipline (arxiv = pre-print archive with timestamped first-public-claim semantics). Reframe: this witness's pre_registered_falsifiers[] block is the cycle's 'arxiv pre-print' — falsifiers MUST land in the JSON BEFORE step-3 fan_out and step-4 promotion gate (raw 71 spirit: pre-registration prevents post-hoc rationalization). OFFLINE-FALLBACK — real arxiv fetch deferred.

falsifiers_preregistered.verdict_check: axis_a non-empty AND axis_b non-empty AND axis_c non-empty AND correlation_lt_0_7 == true

falsifiers_preregistered.name: honesty-triad-3-keys-and-evidence

axis_a_detail.rationale: WHAT — the alpha/beta/gamma envelopes from the prompt header are reproduced verbatim in core_5_op_kernel.intake.{alpha_absorbed,beta_qrng,gamma_bridge} as full objects (not stub strings), preserving byte_hash + source_id + ts + payload_summary. Tests the INTAKE leg of the 5-op kernel against raw 47 cross-repo-trawl-witness mandate.

axis_b_detail.rationale: HOW — each of the 6 falsifiers is deterministically verifiable (file_exists / __WITNESS_VALIDATE__ PASS / hash_eq / length_ge / boolean_gate / schema_validate). No subjective verdicts. Tests the PRE-REGISTRATION leg against raw 71 4-tuple discipline + raw 53 deterministic verifier manifest. β qrng (mod 9 = 4) prioritized F4 (schema self-host) ordering.

axis_c_detail.rationale: WHY — the witness JSON itself runs through tool/witness_emit.hexa --validate post-emit; PASS verdict from that gate proves the kick path is self-consistent (the LLM emitted a witness that survives its own schema gate). Tests the EMIT-AND-VALIDATE leg, closing the loop. Distinct from axis_a (intake content) and axis_b (falsifier shape) — orthogonal at the protocol stage level.

fan_out.correlation_estimate: axis_a (intake content fidelity) ⊥ axis_b (falsifier determinism shape) ⊥ axis_c (post-emit schema self-validate). Pairwise: a×b ≤ 0.3 (intake content does not constrain falsifier verifiability — unrelated stages); a×c ≤ 0.4 (schema gate checks intake non-emptiness, but content fidelity is tested separately by F3 byte_hash match); b×c ≤ 0.5 (schema gate checks falsifier count, but verifiability shape is per-falsifier deterministic-verifier discipline, not array length). All pairs < 0.7.

axes_surfaced.name: intake-envelope-shape

options_considered.option: A — embed full envelope object (mechanism + source_id + byte_hash + ts + payload_summary + applied_to_design) inside intake.{alpha_absorbed,beta_qrng,gamma_bridge}
B — embed only the byte_hash string (compact)
options_considered.rejected_rationale: loses provenance — source_id and ts are needed to reproduce the envelope sample; raw 47 cross-repo-trawl-witness mandate calls for full audit trail

options_considered.option: C — copy literal 'selftest' string (matches selftest=true infra-verify pattern)
options_considered.rejected_rationale: this cycle is NOT selftest=true — the prompt provides REAL envelopes with non-trivial byte_hashes; embedding 'selftest' would be a fabrication/honesty violation against raw 91
byte_hash is the primary cryptographic anchor for outside-the-well witness — source_id alone is impersonation-prone

axes_surfaced.decision: Option A — full envelope object with applied_to_design rationale appended
axes_surfaced.rationale: Full-object intake is the canonical pattern from 32/32 PASS reference cycle 82a59c5f and from 2026-04-27 subagent-task-a witness; preserves provenance + reframe rationale.

axes_surfaced.name: falsifier-count-and-shape

options_considered.rejected_rationale: no headroom for redundancy; if any single falsifier fails the verdict_check, post-hoc rescue is impossible without retroactive invention (raw 71 violation)
diminishing returns for a fresh-test cycle; reference cycle had 8 because it had 8 distinct code-emission sub-claims; this cycle's claim is narrower (protocol fidelity only)

options_considered.option: D — 5 falsifiers but with PASS pre-asserted in body
options_considered.rejected_rationale: violates raw 71 pre-registration spirit — verdict must be derivable post-hoc by deterministic verifier, not asserted up-front

axes_surfaced.decision: Option B — 6 falsifiers; F1-F5 cover the 5-op kernel mandates, F6 covers the honesty triad surface (the part most prone to under-population in past cycles)
axes_surfaced.rationale: F6 is the cycle's specific guard against the honesty-triad-empty failure mode observed in earlier cycles where promotion_counter or no_fabrication_evidence were defaulted to placeholders.

axes_surfaced.name: tier-1-promotion-gating

options_considered.option: A — promote 1 Tier-1 (witness-emitted-and-validated) gated by F1+F2 PASS
B — promote 0 (test cycles do not promote)
options_considered.rejected_rationale: leaves tier_1_count=0 which would force kick sentinel to FAIL (raw 80: kick result requires tier1>=1 for PASS verdict)
inflates promotion_counter; this cycle does only ONE thing — emit a self-validating witness — so 1 Tier-1 reflects the actual delivered work

options_considered.option: D — promote conditionally on post-emit schema gate (lazy)
options_considered.rejected_rationale: promotion is decided pre-emit per protocol step 4; the JSON must declare the promotion and the schema gate decides PASS/FAIL via deterministic verifier — not the other way around

axes_surfaced.decision: Option A — single Tier-1 'witness-emitted-and-self-validated' gated by F1 (file exists) ∧ F2 (schema PASS)
axes_surfaced.rationale: Matches the actual scope of the cycle (protocol-fidelity test). Honest and minimal.

fixpoint_marker: 1-step protocol-fidelity fixpoint: kick(ω-cycle) prompt → witness JSON → tool/witness_emit.hexa --validate → __WITNESS_VALIDATE__ PASS. Idempotence: re-running the same prompt with the same envelopes should yield byte-eq witness modulo ts_utc; same schema gate verdict. N-step ω-saturation (running the kick on its own witness as new alpha-absorb input) is the natural follow-up cycle.
